creator: amutu@amutu.com
text:
this can be realiable reproduced on 2 of my box，both running 10.1-REL amd64：

➜  ~  /libexec/ld-elf.so.1   
[1]    82553 segmentation fault (core dumped)  /libexec/ld-elf.so.1
➜  ~  uname -a
FreeBSD xxx 10.1-RELEASE-p10 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p10 #0: Wed May 13 06:54:13 UTC 2015     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

gdb /libexec/ld-elf.so.1 ./ld-elf.so.1.core
